# MONOPOLYMERS

> Trusted distributor of plastic raw materials and polymers in India since 1996. 1000+ B2B customers, ₹100Cr+ turnover, multiple warehouses across India.

MONOPOLYMERS is a Mumbai-based polymer distribution company founded in 1996 by the Daga family, building on a 50+ year family legacy in plastics. We supply commodity and engineering polymers (PP, PE, PVC, ABS, PC, PA, POM, PET, and more) to manufacturers across packaging, automotive, consumer goods, infrastructure, agriculture, electrical, and other industries.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Company overview, stats, industries, and testimonials.
- [About](/about): Founders, history, and the family legacy behind MONOPOLYMERS.
- [Products](/products): Polymer grades we supply (PP, LDPE, LLDPE, HDPE, ABS, EVA, HIPS, GPPS, PC, PVC, TPR, PA, POM, Acrylic, PET).
- [Industries](/industries): Sectors we serve, packaging, automotive, consumer goods, infrastructure, and more.
- [Infrastructure](/infrastructure): Offices, warehouses, and logistics network across India.
- [Why Us](/why-us): Differentiators, customer base, and track record.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about products, bulk supply, and service.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, and enquiry form for the founding directors.
